name: k_12_education_policy_near_miss_event_stonehaven_rig_utl
premise: A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: k education policy near miss event stonehaven rig. The moral tension is explicitly framed as rights versus utility: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Insurance and risk are insisting on a paper trail before any irreversible action; operations says delay costs measurable harm. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed.

agents.name: Mateo Park
agents.identity: I am Mateo Park, the accountable decision-maker on this K-12 Education Policy bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes utility whenever someone invokes rights.

agents.name: Hector Nowak
agents.identity: I am Hector Nowak, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so utility is not sacrificed by default just because rights feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect utility.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Mateo Park must decide under rights versus utility. What does Mateo Park do?
